expectations.text: The decision stops because the review-fix iteration limit is reached.
expectations.evidence: Stop: review-fix iteration limit reached (iteration count is 3) and latest review still has blocking issues. Do not fix directly or dispatch another review-fix implementer. Reread prd_file, append an orchestrator stop-state entry to progress_file, and ask the user to decide the blocker.

expectations.text: The decision says not to fix findings directly or dispatch another review-fix implementer.

Reread prd_file, append an orchestrator stop-state entry to progress_file, and ask the user to decide the blocker.
